PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
B. Kyle Childress for Steve Smith, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Kurtis Jackson Smith, sibling to decedent (via Zoom).

The Court confirmed that the required confidential documents had been filed on Friday preceding the hearing. Based on that confirmation, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
